Favorites
Product Description
Get easy complexion correction with a formula that acts like makeup and is formulated like skin care.
Delivers 8 benefits in 1 step.
Lightweight coverage for a natural-, flawless-looking complexion.
Easy out-the-door option without that “made-up” look.
Minimal shades cover a wide range of skin tones.
Suitable for all skin types.
NOTE: In electronic media, true colors may vary.
*Over-the-counter drug product
Overview
Eight essential skin benefits. One simple step to flawless.
Mary Kay
®
CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* acts like makeup to instantly correct complexion imperfections while formulated like skin care to help nurture skin’s beauty tomorrow. So remarkably lightweight, you’ll look naturally flawless as if wearing nothing at all. From instant brightening to protection against future damage, hours of hydration to diminishing the look of blemishes and redness, this silky formula leaves skin looking healthier, younger and more vibrant. It’s a can’t-miss if foundation is more coverage than you need, or if you want an easy, out-the-door option without that “made-up” look. Suitable for all skin tones, skin types, and acne-prone and sensitive skin. Oil-free, fragrance-free, non-comedogenic, dermatologist-tested and tested for skin irritancy and allergy.
Key Ingredients
Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* includes the following key ingredients:
Niacinamide and ascorbyl glucoside
are known to help skin’s tone look more even and brighten the look of skin.
Vitamin E and a botanical extract
help calm and soothe skin.
Willow bark extract
contains a natural source of salicylic acid.
Emollients
help hydrate skin, providing nourishing comfort without feeling oily or greasy.
Powerful antioxidants
, including vitamin E and silymarin extract, help defend against skin-damaging free radicals.
Full Ingredients List:
WATER/EAU, 
            
                CYCLOPENTASILOXANE, 
            
                BUTYLENE GLYCOL, 
            
                GLYCERIN, 
            
                PEG-9 POLYDIMETHYLSILOXYETHYL DIMETHICONE, 
            
                NIACINAMIDE, 
            
                MICA, 
            
                PEG-9 DIMETHICONE, 
            
                MAGNESIUM SULFATE, 
            
                ASCORBYL GLUCOSIDE, 
            
                SILYBUM MARIANUM FRUIT EXTRACT, 
            
                TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, 
            
                SALIX NIGRA (WILLOW) BARK EXTRACT, 
            
                SALICYLIC ACID, 
            
                ADENOSINE, 
            
                DIMETHICONE/ PEG-10/15 CROSSPOLYMER, 
            
                DISODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, 
            
                XANTHAN GUM, 
            
                DIPROPYLENE GLYCOL, 
            
                DISODIUM EDTA, 
            
                CYCLOHEXASILOXANE, 
            
                SODIUM CITRATE, 
            
                TOCOPHEROL, 
            
                SORBIC ACID, 
            
                SODIUM BENZOATE, 
            
                BENZYL ALCOHOL, 
            
                ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, 
            
                TITANIUM DIOXIDE, 
            
                IRON OXIDES
How It Works
8 Benefits in 1-
Referred to as a “complexion corrector,” Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* delivers eight benefits in one step to leave skin with a flawless finish.
Protects -
Formulated with a broad spectrum SPF 15* to protect from damaging UVA and UVB rays that can contribute to the visible signs of premature skin aging.
Brightens
Instantly amplifies skin luminosity and brightens the complexion. Radiance is enhanced as the formula helps correct the look of skin discolorations and gives skin a more unified tone.
Corrects With Lightweight Coverage-
Mineral-based pigments help correct the look of imperfections and improve your overall complexion with lightweight coverage that doesn’t give that “made-up” appearance. The look of tired, fatigued skin is transformed as the formula helps smooth away skin dullness. You’re left with a healthy glow and skin that feels soft and smooth.
Minimizes Redness-
Provides visible relief and minimizes the appearance of skin redness. It’s formulated with vitamin E and a botanical extract to help calm and soothe skin. Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* was even tested on women with rosacea who agreed that it helps diminish the look of redness.
Conceals-
Instantly conceals the appearance of blemishes and helps fade the look of marks from past breakouts. Non-comedogenic and oil-free, it soothes and nourishes acne-prone skin and calms troubled skin. CC Cream is formulated with an extract from willow bark, a natural source of salicylic acid. The lightweight formula also conceals dark circles and dark shadows as it blends beautifully with your skin tone.
Hydrates-
Hydrates for 10 hours. Skin feels instantly hydrated. Formulated with emollients that help hydrate skin, CC Cream provides nourishing comfort without feeling oily or greasy.
Reduces Visible Signs of Aging-
Fine lines appear less noticeable so skin looks younger. CC Cream also helps minimize the appearance of pores while visibly improving skin’s texture. It doesn’t settle into fine lines and pores, so you’re left with a smooth-feeling, flawless-looking complexion.
Defends-
The product contains antioxidants to help defend against skin-damaging free radicals.
Application Tips
On-the-Go Daytime Casual:
Use fingertips to apply CC Cream to your face like foundation. Start in the middle of the face, working outward toward hairline and along the jawline.
Dressed Up for Work or After-Five:
For full coverage, use your fingertips to apply CC Cream to your face as if it were a moisturizer. Wait a minute to absorb, then apply your foundation formula.
All prices are suggested retail.
×

title: Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* | Mary Kay
h1: Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15*
main_text:

De mayor venta
Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15*
De mayor venta
Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15*
¡Corrección del cutis y protección solar con SPF 15 en un solo paso!
$22.00
1 onza líquida
Calificación de clientes de 3,7 de 5

$22.00
Favoritos
Descripción del producto
Fácil corrección a tu cutis con una fórmula que actúa como maquillaje y como producto del cuidado de la piel.
Ofrece 8 beneficios en 1 solo paso.
Cobertura ligera para una tez de apariencia impecable y natural.
Es una opción súper práctica sin tener que recrear un
look
de maquillaje muy “elaborado”.
Unos cuantos tonos cubren una gran gama de tonos de piel.
Adecuada para todos los tipos de piel.
NOTA: Los colores pueden variar en los medios electrónicos.
*Medicamento que se vende sin receta
Información general
Ocho beneficios esenciales para la piel. Un rostro impecable en un solo paso.
Mary Kay
®
CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15
* actúa como una base de maquillaje correctora de imperfecciones del cutis al instante y a la vez está formulada como producto del cuidado de la piel para ayudar a nutrirla y embellecerla para el futuro. Es tan ligera que lucirás natural e impecable sin que parezca que aplicaste maquillaje. Esta fórmula sedosa deja la piel sintiéndose sana, juvenil y más vibrante, protege al instante contra el daño futuro, hidrata por horas y disminuye la apariencia de manchas o enrojecimiento de la piel. Esta crema es esencial si tu base te da más cobertura de la que necesitas, o si deseas una opción súper práctica sin luzcas un
look
de maquillaje muy elaborado. Adecuada para todo tipo de piel, piel propensa al acné y piel sensible. Probada por dermatólogos, ha sido sometida a pruebas para alergias e irritación de la piel, es adecuada para piel sensible, no contiene fragancias ni aceites.
Ingredientes clave
Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* incluye los siguientes ingredientes clave:
Niacinamida y glucósido
de ascorbil que son conocidos por ayudar a que el tono de la piel luzca más uniforme y más radiante.
Vitamina E y un extracto botánico
para ayudar a calmar y tersar la piel.
Extracto de corteza de sauce,
un ingrediente que acondiciona la piel.
Emollientes
que ayudan a hidratar, nutrir y confortar la piel sin que se sienta grasosa.
Poderosos antioxidantes
incluidos la vitamina E y el extracto de silymarin, ayudan a defender la piel de los radicales libres agresores de la piel.
Lista completa de ingredientes:
WATER/EAU, 
            
                CYCLOPENTASILOXANE, 
            
                BUTYLENE GLYCOL, 
            
                GLYCERIN, 
            
                PEG-9 POLYDIMETHYLSILOXYETHYL DIMETHICONE, 
            
                NIACINAMIDE, 
            
                MICA, 
            
                PEG-9 DIMETHICONE, 
            
                MAGNESIUM SULFATE, 
            
                ASCORBYL GLUCOSIDE, 
            
                SILYBUM MARIANUM FRUIT EXTRACT, 
            
                TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, 
            
                SALIX NIGRA (WILLOW) BARK EXTRACT, 
            
                SALICYLIC ACID, 
            
                ADENOSINE, 
            
                DIMETHICONE/ PEG-10/15 CROSSPOLYMER, 
            
                DISODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, 
            
                XANTHAN GUM, 
            
                DIPROPYLENE GLYCOL, 
            
                DISODIUM EDTA, 
            
                CYCLOHEXASILOXANE, 
            
                SODIUM CITRATE, 
            
                TOCOPHEROL, 
            
                SORBIC ACID, 
            
                SODIUM BENZOATE, 
            
                BENZYL ALCOHOL, 
            
                ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, 
            
                TITANIUM DIOXIDE, 
            
                IRON OXIDES
Cómo funciona
8 beneficios en 1-
Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* se conoce como crema “correctora del cutis” y brinda ocho beneficios en un solo paso dejando el cutis con acabado impecable.
Protege-
Formulada con amplio espectro SPF 15* para proteger de los dañinos rayos solares UVA y UVB que pueden contribuir a las señales visibles del envejecimiento prematuro de la piel.
Ilumina-
Aumenta la luminosidad de la piel al instante e ilumina el rostro. El cutis se ve más radiante, ya que la fórmula ayuda a corregir la apariencia de las manchas de la piel y le da un tono más uniforme.
Corrige con cobertura ligera-
Pigmentos basados en minerales ayudan a corregir la apariencia de imperfecciones y mejoran la apariencia general de tu tez con cobertura ligera sin que parezca que aplicaste maquillaje. La apariencia de piel cansada y fatigada setransforma, ya que la fórmula ayuda a suavizar la opacidad de la piel. Deja la piel con un brillo saludable y se siente suave y tersa.
Minimiza el enrojecimiento de la piel-
Calma visiblemente la piel y reduce la apariencia de enrojecimiento. Está formulada con vitamina E y extractos botánicos que ayuda a calmar y a tersar la piel. Mary Kay® CC Cream Sunscreen Broad Spectrum SPF 15* fue probada con mujeres con rosácea que acordaron en que ayudó a disminuir la apariencia del enrojecimiento de la piel.
Disimula-
Disimula la apariencia de la piel propensa al acné y ayuda a disipar la apariencia de marcas de espinillas. No es comedogénica ni contiene aceites, calma y nutre la piel propensa al acné y problemas de la piel. La crema CC está formulada con extracto de corteza de sauce, un recurso natural de ácido salicílico. Esta fórmula ligera además disimula las ojeras y las sombras oscuras ya que se difumina bellamente en tu tono de piel.
Hidrata-
Hidrata hasta por 10 horas La piel se siente hidratada al instante. Formulada con emolientes que ayudan a hidratar la piel, la crema CC nutre y conforta sin que la piel se sienta grasosa.
Reduce las señales visibles de envejecimiento-
Las líneas finas lucen menos visibles y la piel tiene una apariencia juvenil. La crema CC también ayuda a reducir la apariencia de poros y la vez mejora visiblemente la textura de la piel. No se acumula en las líneas finas y poros, y te deja el rostro sintiéndose suave y de apariencia impecable.
Defiende-
Este producto contiene antioxidantes para ayudar a defender de los radicales libres agresores de la piel.
Consejos de aplicación
Para un look casual de día:
Usa la yema de los dedos para aplicar CC Cream en tu rostro como si aplicaras tu base regular. Comienza en el centro hacia la línea del cabello y a lo largo del perfil de la mandíbula.
Para un look de oficina y para la noche:
Para cobertura completa, usa las yemas de los dedos para aplicar CC Cream como si aplicaras tu humectante. Espera un minuto para que se absorba y luego aplica tu fórmula de base.
Precios sugeridos al menudeo.
×

Product Description
Meet your new favorite eye shadow! How do we know? Because 7 out of 10 women told us it’s their new favorite! Powered by Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology, every stroke of this must-have eye shadow boasts true, high-impact color payoff with nonstop wear. Blendable and buildable, pigment-rich shades seamlessly blend together for perfectly put-together makeup looks. And messy fallout’s a thing of the past. Crease-free and fadeproof, you can count on this long-lasting color to stay looking fresh through work, workouts, weather and more.
Overview
Visualize the most stunning, pigment-rich eye shadow imaginable. Make it easy to wear with a lifeproof formula. Add an array of matte and shimmer shades curated by top international makeup artists. Can you have it all? Absolutely! Open your eyes to Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Eye Shadow – the high-confidence, no-compromise, get-ready-for-compliments color experience.
Formula Attributes
Dermatologist-tested.
Ophthalmologist-tested.
Clinically tested for skin irritancy and allergy.
Suitable for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers.
Claims and Benefits
Women are raving – and passing it on!
87% gave
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Eye Shadow
a big shout-out for how much they liked it.*
72% raved that it’s their new favorite eye shadow.*
84% would recommend it to a friend.*
77% received compliments when wearing it.*
*Results based on a one-week independent consumer study during which 210 women used
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Eye Shadow
every day for seven days
How It Works
Mary Kay Chromafusion® Matrix Technology is a beauty industry innovation that delivers intense color payoff and long-lasting wear. This advanced hybrid technique wraps finely milled, premium pigments in a silken layer of cream to amplify color like never before. The enhanced pigments are then fused into a lightweight powder to create a smooth and flexible finish. The result? A silky eye shadow that glides on effortlessly and stays looking fresh through work, workouts, weather and more.

Favoritos
Descripción del producto
¡Te presentamos tu nueva sombra favorita! ¿Cómo lo sabemos? ¡Porque 7 de 10 mujeres nos dijeron que es su nueva favorita! Con el poder de
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology
, cada aplicación de esta sombra imprescindible, brinda color intenso de alto impacto con extrema adherencia. Los tonos ricos en pigmentos difuminables y que se pueden aplicar en capas se combinan a la perfección para crear looks de maquillaje perfectamente definidos. ¡Y el exceso de sombra en tu rostro es cosa del pasado! No se corre ni se desvanece, puedes contar con este maquillaje de larga duración ya que se mantiene con aspecto fresco durante tu día de trabajo, el gimnasio y mucho más, sin importar la temperatura.
Información general
Visualiza la sombra de ojos más deslumbrante y rica en pigmentos que puedas imaginar. Haz que sea fácil de usar con una fórmula perdurable. Añade una variedad de tonos mates y luminosos seleccionados por maquillistas internacionales destacados. ¿Se puede tenerlo todo? ¡Por supuesto! Abre los ojos a la
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Eye Shadow
, una experiencia de maquillaje que te da confianza, color sin límites que te hará recibir cumplidos.
Atributos de la fórmula
Probada por dermatólogos.
Oftalmológicamente evaluada.
Clínicamente evaluada contra irritación y alergias de la piel.
Adecuado para ojos sensibles y quienes usan lentes de contacto.
Declaraciones y beneficios
¡A las mujeres les encantan y están corriendo la voz!
Un 87% le dio a la
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Eye Shadow
un gran reconocimiento por lo mucho que les gustaron.*
Un 72% dijo que era su nueva sombra favorita.*
Un 84% se lo recomendaría a una amiga.*
Un 77% recibió halagos cuando la usó.*
*Según resultados de un estudio independiente de una semana en el que 210 mujeres usaron la
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Eye Shadow
cada día, durante siete días.
Cómo funciona
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology
es una innovación en la industria de la belleza que ofrece una intensidad de color excepcional y duración prolongada. Esta avanzada técnica híbrida envuelve pigmentos de primera finamente pulverizados en una sedosa capa de crema para amplificar el color como nunca antes. Los pigmentos acentuados se fusionan en un polvo liviano para crear un acabado suave y flexible. ¿El resultado? Una sedosa sombra de ojos que se desliza sin esfuerzo y se mantiene luciendo fresca durante el trabajo, el gimnasio y mucho más, sin importar la temperatura.
Precios sugeridos al menudeo.

Favorites
Product Description
Thanks to Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology, every silky swipe of this complexion-boosting highlighter delivers long-lasting brilliance. The feather-light powder layers effortlessly for a soft, radiant finish that won’t settle into pores or fine lines. Designed to flatter every skin tone, each shade adds a lit-from-within shimmer that builds and blends with ease. Apply to the high points of your face to give a subtle, “lifted” appearance where light naturally touches the skin.
Overview
Elevate your natural glow with effortless elegance. Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Highlighter fuses pure color with light-reflecting pigments for natural-looking radiance. Give your complexion a boost of luminosity with shades that last from day to night — perfect for cheekbones, brow bones and anywhere else you want a touch of brilliance.
Formula Attributes
Clinically tested for skin irritancy and allergy.
Oil-free.
Non-comedogenic.
Suitable for sensitive skin.
Claims and Benefits
Nine out of 10 women who tried Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Blush, Contour and Highlighter:*
Would recommend them to a friend.
Said they’re foolproof (no tutorial needed for great results).
Said they gave an authentic, not fake, look.
*Results based on a one-week independent consumer study during which 60 women used Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Blush, Contour and Highlighter daily
How It Works
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology is a beauty industry innovation that elevates pure color radiance while enabling all-day wear. This advanced hybrid technique wraps finely milled, premium pigments in a silken layer of cream to amplify cheek color like never before. The enhanced pigments are then fused into a lightweight powder to create a smooth and flexible finish. The result? A luminous highlighter that glides on evenly and lasts through work, workouts, weather and more.
Application Tips
For the best results, apply Mary Kay Chromafusion® Highlighter with a makeup brush. To enhance your natural contours, use the shorter edge of the Mary Kay
®
Cheek Brush for precise application along the tops of your cheekbones. To highlight smaller areas — such as the bridge of your nose, tip of your nose or Cupid’s bow — use the Mary Kay
®
All-Over Eye Shadow Brush to add dimension and create a lifted look.
All prices are suggested retail.

Favoritos
Descripción del producto
Gracias a la
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology
, cada aplicación sedosa de este iluminador que realza el rostro brinda brillo de larga duración. El polvo ultraligero se aplica en capas sin esfuerzo para un acabado suave y radiante que no se acomula en los poros ni en las líneas finas. Diseñado para favorecer todos los tonos de piel, cada tono aporta un brillo que se puede aplicar en capas y difuminar con facilidad. Aplícalo en los puntos altos de tu rostro para darle una apariencia sutil y "elevada" donde la luz toca la piel de manera natural.
Información general
Eleva tu resplandor natural con elegancia sin esfuerzo. El
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Highlighter
ofrece una fusión de color puro y pigmentos que reflejan la luz para obtener una luminosidad de aspecto natural. Dale a tu cutis un impulso de luminosidad con tonos que duran del día a la noche, perfectos para los pómulos, el hueso de la ceja y cualquier otro lugar que desees un toque de resplandor.
Atributos de la fórmula
Clínicamente evaluada contra irritación y alergias de la piel.
Sin aceites
No comedogénica.
Adecuada para piel sensible.
Declaraciones y beneficios
Nueve de cada diez mujeres que probaron el Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Blush, Contour y Highlighter:*
Se lo recomendarían a una amiga.
Dijeron que son infalibles (no se necesita un instructivo para obtener resultados fabulosos).
Dijeron que experimentaron una apariencia natural en vez de artificial.
*Resultados según un estudio independiente con consumidoras en el cual 60 mujeres usaron el
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Blush, Contour
y
Highlighter
todos los días durante una semana.
Cómo funciona
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Matrix Technology
es una innovación en la industria de la belleza que eleva el resplandor del color puro y al mismo tiempo permite una duración prolongada. Esta avanzada técnica híbrida envuelve pigmentos de primera finamente pulverizados en una sedosa capa de crema para amplificar el color de las mejillas como nunca antes. Los pigmentos acentuados se fusionan en un polvo liviano para crear un acabado suave y flexible. ¿El resultado? Un iluminador luminoso que se desliza de manera uniforme y dura durante el trabajo, el gimnasio y mucho más, sin importar la temperatura.
Consejos de aplicación
Para obtener los mejores resultados, aplica el
Mary Kay Chromafusion
®
Highlighter
con una brocha para maquillaje. Para resaltar tus contornos naturales, usa el borde más corto de la
Mary Kay
®
Cheek Brush
para una aplicación precisa en la parte superior de los pómulos. Para iluminar áreas más pequeñas, como el puente de la nariz, la punta de la nariz o el arco de cupido, usa la
Mary Kay
®
All-Over Eye Shadow Brush
para añadir dimensión y crear un look más elevado.
Precios sugeridos al menudeo.

This foundation smooths the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, plus reduces the appearance of imperfections, pores, dark circles and shadows while it evens out the look of skin tone. The result? Skin that instantly looks healthier, firmer and younger.

Favorites
Product Description
Formulated with the
Age Minimize 3D
®
Complex,
TimeWise
®
Matte 3D Foundation goes beyond seamless coverage – it delivers ageless beauty. The formula gives you a flawless, younger-looking complexion with foundation that feels weightless on skin and looks natural all day long.
Shades developed with our exclusive
IntelliMatch
™ Technology.
Includes
Age Minimize 3D
®
Complex found in
TimeWise
®
Miracle Set 3D
®
skin care products.
12 hours of oil control.
Humidity- and sweat-resistant formula.
Long-lasting yet weightless coverage in a matte finish.
Foundation for oily skin.
TimeWise
®
Age Minimize 3D
™ Complex helps prevent skin damage caused by blue light.
Overview
Find your true shade in a matte formula designed with our exclusive IntelliMatch™ Technology. Then, enjoy 12 hours of weightless wear in a foundation that looks natural and feels comfortable all day. Infused with our Age Minimize 3D
®
Complex, this foundation helps to defend, delay and deliver for beautiful results. Get a flawless, younger-looking complexion with an oil-absorbing formula that blends evenly to provide buildable, medium-to-full coverage.
Formula Attributes:
Dermatologist-tested.
Clinically tested for skin irritancy and allergy.
Non-comedogenic.
Suitable for sensitive skin.
Suitable for sensitive eyes and contact lens wearers.
Fragrance-free and oil-free.
Foundation for oily skin.
Key Ingredients
Encapsulated resveratrol
Resveratrol is an age-fighting sensation with multiple benefits:
It provides antioxidant benefits for powerful protection against free radicals on skin. It’s shown to:
Counteract the negative effects of free radicals on skin.*
Increase natural protective antioxidants.*
Work in harmony with natural antioxidants* to help support the skin barrier.
It helps promote more even skin tone.*
It supports skin’s natural collagen* to help improve the look of fine lines and wrinkles.
Resveratrol is a compound in red grapes and red wine that protects against environmental stressors.
Our complex features a purified form extracted from the highest concentration found in nature: Japanese knotweed.
Resveratrol is encapsulated — merged within layers of lipids and water. Each layer slowly melts away when applied to skin to release this highly active ingredient.
Vitamin B3
A water-soluble, B-complex vitamin that includes niacin, vitamin B3 is a well-known brightening superpower.
It targets the look of uneven skin tone.
Vitamin B3 also works double duty as an antioxidant for additional free-radical defense on skin.
Age-defying peptide
Our peptide is made up of four amino acids linked together that help contribute to younger-looking skin.*
It also supports skin’s natural collagen and elastin* for a more youthful, resilient look.
*Based on in vitro testing of key ingredients
Full Ingredients List:
WATER/EAU, 
            
                CYCLOPENTASILOXANE, 
            
                BUTYLENE GLYCOL, 
            
                PEG-9 DIMETHICONE, 
            
                TRIMETHYLSILOXYSILICATE, 
            
                LAURYL METHACRYLATE/GLYCOL DIMETHACRYLATE CROSSPOLYMER, 
            
                PEG/PPG-20/15 DIMETHICONE, 
            
                MAGNESIUM SULFATE, 
            
                NIACINAMIDE, 
            
                POLYMETHYLSILSESQUIOXANE, 
            
                RESVERATROL, 
            
                OLIGOPEPTIDE-1, 
            
                GLYCERIN, 
            
                DIMETHICONE, 
            
                TOCOPHERYL ACETATE, 
            
                SILICA, 
            
                PROPYLENE GLYCOL, 
            
                NYLON-12, 
            
                ACRYLATES/DIMETHICONE COPOLYMER, 
            
                CYCLOHEXASILOXANE, 
            
                ALUMINUM HYDROXIDE, 
            
                DIMETHICONE/VINYL DIMETHICONE CROSSPOLYMER, 
            
                XANTHAN GUM, 
            
                DISODIUM STEAROYL GLUTAMATE, 
            
                POLYMETHYL METHACRYLATE, 
            
                TRIETHANOLAMINE, 
            
                TRICAPRYLIN, 
            
                DISODIUM EDTA, 
            
                METHYLPARABEN, 
            
                PROPYLPARABEN, 
            
                DIAZOLIDINYL UREA, 
            
                TITANIUM DIOXIDE, 
            
                IRON OXIDES
Key Benefits
This foundation smooths the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, plus reduces the appearance of imperfections, pores, dark circles and shadows while it evens out the look of skin tone. The result? Skin that instantly looks healthier, firmer and younger.
Leaves no oily or greasy after-feel and won’t settle into fine lines.
The humidity-, sweat- and transfer-resistant formula keeps skin looking matte all day.
Claims and Benefits
In an independent consumer study, 83% of women agreed, “It’s my new go-to foundation.”
1
In fact, they delighted, “I’ve finally found the perfect foundation.”
1
9 of 10 women said
1
TimeWise
®
Matte 3D Foundation:
Provides a seamless match to my skin tone (91%).
Leaves a natural-looking finish (92%).
Helps reduce shine throughout the day (92%).
Feels comfortable on skin (93%) and does not feel drying (90%).
12 hours of oil control from the sweat-, humidity- and transfer-resistant formula.
1
Based on panelists who agreed with the statements in a one-week independent consumer study in which 157 women used TimeWise
®
Matte 3D Foundation daily.
How It Works
We employed our exclusive IntelliMatch™ Technology to capture the skin tones of over 1,000 women from around the world. This data helped us improve the authenticity of our foundation shades so that more women can find a seamless match to their unique skin tone.
Three key areas were scanned (forehead, cheek and décolleté) to capture over 3,000 variations of tone for more accurate data. Through hundreds of hours in the lab perfecting the right mix of pigments, TimeWise
®
Matte 3D and TimeWise
®
Luminous 3D Foundations provide an authentically true match to a wide range of women’s skin.
New and Oh-So-Convenient Packaging
A clear window allows for easy viewing of the shade and lets you know when it may be time to reorder.
The plastic tube makes it worry-free to take with you on trips, carry in a makeup bag or drop in a drawer – unlike glass, it can’t chip, break or shatter.
With a light squeeze, the formula dispenses easily, yet you control the amount you want.
Application Tips
With new, easier-than-ever shade names, you’ll find your perfect match even faster.
Each shade name includes:
The general skin tone (ivory, beige or bronze).
The undertone (C = cool, N = neutral or W = warm).
The depth of the shade within the skin tone (the lowest number is the lightest and becomes darker as the number increases).
The chart below can help identify which undertone you may have.
Undertone
This might be you if …
C = Cool undertone of pink, red or bluish
N = Neutral undertone of a pink/golden yellow mix or olive
W = Warm undertone of yellow, golden or peach
When in the sun your
skin burns or turns pink
skin turns pink initially and/or turns bronze
skin turns a deeper tone
Use as a guide. Your Independent Beauty Consultant can help you select the perfect shades to try.
Awards and Honors
We're proud of all our products and are committed to offering you only the highest-quality, most effective products – so we're very happy when others recognize our products and when our customers agree with us! Here are some of the awards and media mentions for this product.
Las bases
TimeWise 3D
™ han logrado el sello Good Housekeeping, después de la evaluación o revisión por parte de los expertos del Instituto de Investigación Good Housekeeping. Formuladas con el Complejo 3D
®
, las bases mate 3D y luminosa 3D
TimeWise
®
van más allá de una cobertura impecable... ¡brindan belleza sin edad!
All prices are suggested retail.
×
TimeWise® Matte 3D Foundation

Add To Bag
$26.00
Seamless coverage meets ageless beauty.
Key Ingredients
Encapsulated Resveratrol
Resveratrol is an age-fighting sensation with multiple benefits.
Source In Complex
It provides antioxidant benefits for powerful protection against free radicals on skin. It’s shown to:
Counteract the negative effects of free radicals on skin.*
Increase natural protective antioxidants.*
Work in harmony with natural antioxidants* to help support the skin barrier.
It helps promote more even skin tone.*
It supports skin’s natural collagen* to help improve the look of fine lines and wrinkles.
Vitamin B3
A water-soluble, B-complex vitamin that includes niacin, vitamin B3 is a well-known brightening superpower.
It targets the look of uneven skin tone.
Vitamin B3 also works double duty as an antioxidant for additional free-radical defense on skin.
Age-defying Peptide
Our peptide is made up of four amino acids linked together that help contribute to younger-looking skin.*
It also supports skin’s natural collagen and elastin* for a more youthful, resilient look.
What to Know
9 of 10 women said1 TimeWise® Matte 3D Foundation:
Provides a seamless match to my skin tone (91%).
Leaves a natural-looking finish (92%).
Helps reduce shine throughout the day (92%).
Feels comfortable on skin (93%) and does not feel drying (90%).
12 hours of oil control from the sweat-, humidity- and transfer-resistant formula.
“I’ve finally found the perfect foundation.”**
This foundation smooths the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles, plus reduces the appearance of imperfections, pores, dark circles and shadows while it evens out the look of skin tone. The result? Skin that instantly looks healthier, firmer and younger.
Leaves no oily or greasy after-feel and won’t settle into fine lines.
The humidity-, sweat- and transfer-resistant formula keeps skin looking matte all day.
*Based on in vitro testing of key ingredient
**Based on panelists who agreed with the statements in a one-week independent consumer study in which 157 women used TimeWise® Matte 3D Foundation daily.
